name: Pumpkin Ice Cream Pie with Caramel Sauce
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small bowl, combine crushed gingersnaps and melted butter. Mix well.
2. Press the mixture firmly into the bottom and up sides of a 9-inch pie plate.
3. Refrigerate for 10-15 minutes.
4. Meanwhile, in a large bowl, stir 1/2 teaspoon cinnamon into the ice cream. Spoon over the crust.
5. Freeze until firm.
6. In a medium bowl, combine brown sugar, ginger, cinnamon, cloves, and canned pumpkin. Mix well.
7. Fold in whipped cream and spoon over the ice cream layer.
8. Freeze for 3 hours until firm.
9. Let stand at room temperature for 15-20 minutes before serving.
10. In a small saucepan, combine caramel topping and chopped pecans. Cook over medium heat until heated through, stirring constantly.
11. Serve warm over the pie.
